SubRule.sql: select count(1),TransType,sum(TransAmount) - sum(FailDispenseAmount) from TransDetail where ((HostCommFlag=0 and HostResponseCode='00' and ((CashDevErrorFlag=0 and ReversalFlag=0) or CashDevErrorFlag=15) and ICErrorFlag=0) or CardType='1111')

select count(1),TransType,sum(case CashDevErrorFlag when 15 then FailDispenseAmount ELSE TransAmount END) from TransDetail where ((HostCommFlag=0 and CashDevErrorFlag in (1,2,3,4,15) and ReversalFlag <> 2) or (HostCommFlag in (4,5,6,8) and ReversalFlag <> 2) or (ReversalFlag > 0 and ReversalFlag <> 2) or (ICErrorFlag in (1,3) and ReversalFlag <> 2))

select count(1),TransType,sum(TransAmount) from TransDetail where ((CashDevErrorFlag in (7,8,9,10,11,12,13,14,99) and ReversalFlag <> 2) or (HostCommFlag in (3,4,5,6,8) and CashDevErrorFlag=0 and ReversalFlag=0) or (HostCommFlag=7 and HostResponseCode not in ({0}) and CashDevErrorFlag=0) or (ReversalFlag > 0 and ReversalFlag <> 2) or (ICErrorFlag in (1,3) and ReversalFlag <> 2))

select count(1),TransType,sum(TransAmount) from TransDetail where ((HostCommFlag in (4,5,6,8) and ReversalFlag=0) or (ReversalFlag <> 0 and ReversalFlag <> 2) or (ICErrorFlag in (1,3) and ReversalFlag <> 2))
select count(1),TransType,sum(TransAmount) from TransDetail where (ReversalFlag <> 0 and ReversalFlag <> 2)

select CardNumber,LocalSerialNumber,TransType,LocalTransDate||LocalTransTime,TransCurrency,TransAmount,HostResponseCode,CashDevErrorFlag from TransDetail where (CashDevErrorFlag in (1,2,4,7,8,10,11,12,13,14,99) and ReversalFlag=0)

select CardNumber,LocalSerialNumber,TransType,LocalTransDate||LocalTransTime,TransCurrency,TransAmount,HostResponseCode,CashDevErrorFlag,ReversalFlag,HostCommFlag from TransDetail where (ReversalFlag <> 0 and ReversalFlag <> 2)

select CardNumber,LocalSerialNumber,TransType,LocalTransDate||LocalTransTime,TransCurrency,TransAmount,HostResponseCode,HostCommFlag from TransDetail where (HostCommFlag in (4,5,6,8) and CashDevErrorFlag=0 and ReversalFlag=0)

select CardNumber,LocalSerialNumber,TransType,LocalTransDate||LocalTransTime,TransCurrency,TransAmount,HostResponseCode,HostCommFlag from TransDetail where (HostCommFlag in (4,5,6,8) and CashDevErrorFlag=0 and ReversalFlag=0)

select CardNumber,LocalSerialNumber,TransType,LocalTransDate||LocalTransTime,TransCurrency,TransAmount,HostResponseCode,HostCommFlag from TransDetail where (HostCommFlag in (4,5,6,8) and ReversalFlag=0)

select CardNumber,LocalSerialNumber,TransType,LocalTransDate||LocalTransTime,TransCurrency,TransAmount,HostResponseCode,CashDevErrorFlag from TransDetail where (CashDevErrorFlag in (3,9) and ReversalFlag <> 2)

select CardNumber,LocalSerialNumber,TransType,LocalTransDate||LocalTransTime,TransCurrency,TransAmount,HostResponseCode,HostCommFlag from TransDetail where ((HostCommFlag=7 and HostResponseCode not in ({0}) and CashDevErrorFlag=0 and ReversalFlag <> 2) or (HostResponseCode in ({0}) and HostCommFlag=7 and CashDevErrorFlag <> 6))

select CardNumber,LocalSerialNumber,TransType,LocalTransDate||LocalTransTime,TransCurrency,TransAmount,HostResponseCode,ICErrorFlag from TransDetail where (ICTransFlag=1 and HostCommFlag <> 9 and ICErrorFlag > 0 and CashDevErrorFlag=0 and ReversalFlag <> 2 and HostResponseCode=0)
